calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281619 --event evt-petition-disposition && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const hits = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|docket|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(hits);

{"cell_id": "17", "max_tokens": 20000, "yield_time_ms": 20000}

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"RLUIPA \"Equal Terms\" \"substantial burden\" land use",filed_after:"2015-01-01",filed_before:"2026-07-16",order_by:"score desc",num_results:10,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","snippet","absolute_url"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",citation:"727 S.W.3d 400",num_results:5,fields:["caseName","court_citation_string","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","opinions"]}); for (const c of (r?.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"originating_court\")) | select(.originating_court == \"Supreme Court of Kentucky\")' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\")) | select((.term|tostring) == \"2025\")' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.sections | keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.sections' metrics/statpack.json | sed -n '1,260p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq -r '.sections[] | [.title, .scope] | @tsv' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.sections[] | select(.title | test(\"originating court\"; \"i\")) | .buckets[] | select(.key == \"Supreme Court of Kentucky\")' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; git status --short --untracked-files=all","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
